name: SQL Injection Login
detail: SQL injection payload rejected. Expected 401, got 401.

name: XSS Injection Registration
detail: Username with script tag accepted and stored (user id 307). Input sanitization missing. Output escaping required at render time.

name: Unauthenticated Me
detail: No cookies sent, endpoint correctly returns 401.

name: Unauthenticated Users List
detail: Accessing user list without auth returns 401.

name: Logout Without Session
detail: Logout without active session returns 200 (idempotent, acceptable).

name: Empty Registration Body
detail: Empty body rejected with validation error.

name: Rate Limiting
detail: First 10 login attempts returned 401, subsequent 10 returned 429. Rate limit activates after ~10 rapid requests.
